message:
Change default keybinds to Super+=/Super+- (no numpad needed)

- Default zoom-in changed from <Super>KP_Add to <Super>equal
- Default zoom-out changed from <Super>KP_Subtract to <Super>minus
- Prefs keybind entries show apply button for clearer UX

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,12 +30,12 @@
       <description>App IDs exempt from auto-shrink</description>
     </key>
     <key name="zoom-in-keybind" type="as">
-      <default>['<Super>KP_Add']</default>
+      <default>['<Super>equal']</default>
       <summary>Zoom in keybind</summary>
       <description>Keybinding to zoom in (increase scale)</description>
     </key>
     <key name="zoom-out-keybind" type="as">
-      <default>['<Super>KP_Subtract']</default>
+      <default>['<Super>minus']</default>
       <summary>Zoom out keybind</summary>
       <description>Keybinding to zoom out (decrease scale)</description>
     </key>
